resources.string: The app can now move beyond a placeholder screen and save a text capsule into the local Room database.
You can open a capsule form, enter a title and story, pass validation, and save the result locally as the first real slice of Echoes.
Write the story you want to seal.
This version is local-first and text-only on purpose. Image support comes next, but the core creation flow needs to be solid first.
Basic validation is enabled now: title must be at least 3 characters and story text at least 10 characters.
Title must be at least 3 characters.
Story text must be at least 10 characters.
Could not save the capsule. Try again.
